input.title: [Capacitor] Set overscroll background color from theme
input.body:
There was a default white background in the capacitor WebView. It has been temporarily fixed for Dark theme by using ios configuration inside of `capacitor.config.ts` as:

```
ios: {
  backgroundColor: '000000',
},
```

But we want the `backgroundColor` to be able to configurable based on the app's theme Light or Dark.

## Steps to Reproduce
- Sync capacitor
- Run iOS build
- Change to Light theme
- Try to scroll past the top or bottom of the screen.

## Current Behavior
- A white background appears. 

## Expected Behavior
- The background should be white or black depending upon the app's theme.
